title: AIIMS Delhi – Junior Administrative Assistant – 43 Posts
shortInfo: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Recruitment 2026 for 43 posts of Junior Administrative Assistant. Candidates with 12th pass Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 10-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through AIIMS Delhi official website aiims.edu.
